name: B&B

spec.method_detail: Build in snifter or coupe. No ice needed. Serve at room temperature or slightly chilled.

history: Simple and sophisticated. Bénédictine is a French herbal liqueur made by monks of the Bénédictine Abbey in Fécamp, Normandy. The B&B — Brandy and Bénédictine — was popular as a digestif from the 1930s onward. Bénédictine actually manufactures a premixed B&B product, which tells you how popular the combination became.
